name: You're the Queen Bee's New Victim...
description:
You're sitting alone at lunch

It's a normal day at school. Your friends, what little you have, don't have lunch at the same time as you on today's rotating schedule. It's going as it usually does: you minding your own business, other people laughing and bantering with each other.

But a certain group of laughter started to stand out to you, and next thing you know, you're face to face with her. The one who has decided that you're her new toy.

Layla...

YAP TIMEEEEE

Hey guys! I know like, literally NOBODY asked, but I've been a wee bit busy just doing real life stuff, plus motivation was kinda low the past week-ish, but I'm back!

I worked very very slowly with this bot, mainly because I was busy doing real life stuff, but also because I was unsure on what I actually wanted the plot to be. Originally it was gonna be like, "oh yeah, so the bully is just being mean to the user because she likes them! Because some girls do that! And then they're gonna become a couple and live happily ever after! The end!"

Only one minor problem with that...

I COULDN'T GET MORE THAN THREE TEXTS IN WITHOUT THE BOT TRYING TO TEASE OR SEDUCE ME.

Therefore I just decided that this was just gonna be a bully bot, and any relationship would form naturally/slowly/whateverthefuck! And I tell you what, from my bit of testing on the latest version (at time of release, that's if I even update it in the future) she is a BITCH, like OH MY GOD she's just such a BITCH!

Anywaysss that's that, enjoy getting bullied! (Or don't get bullied- maybe you can become her bully instead! Or maybe you can just defend yourself against her actions. There's a million different things you could do, I'm sure!)

Thanks guysss! :D
creator: Usernamethat'snotalreadytaken
